metadata.description: gvm-style multi-account switcher for lark-cli (Lark/Feishu CLI) — parallel-safe, agent-native.

plugins.name: lark-switch
plugins.description: Run lark-cli as any of several Feishu/Lark accounts (multi-tenant) without global-state races. Each account is pinned to its own config home; agents pick an identity per command with stateless `run` and machine-readable `ls --json`.
